source_reports.use_as: dynamic data and screen-family baseline only

transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: loader observed; one force-stop explicit relaunch recovered catalog; later ambient recovery returned to prolonged loader
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Back, Home, foreground, force-stop and explicit relaunch only.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Catalog recovery was observed once after approved cleanup, but a later ambient recovery recurred into prolonged loader.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: TASK-027 must distinguish a successful recovery from the original launch anomaly.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: catalog focus moved from rail into dynamic grid and sampled deeper list rows
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Use safe rail/catalog focus recovery and avoid Select on unproven boundary targets.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Dynamic catalog was sampled by category and focus behavior only; no fixed titles or counts are asserted.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Verify focus, categories and scroll behavior, not exact game titles or counts.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.trigger_category: safe search route and visible keyboard input
transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: search keyboard opened; safe text input had no visual effect; Back and Escape recovery trapped
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Use visible keyboard controls; recover by safe navigation or force-stop relaunch if trapped.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Search no-results could not be completed because the keyboard recovery trap recurred; cleanup relaunch recovered catalog.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Search recovery is a regression branch, not a solved transition.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.trigger_category: safe settings focus movement without logout confirmation
transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: settings root opened; precise safe Gamepad entry opened setup and close returned to Settings
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Cancel any logout/profile mutation boundary immediately; do not reset or pair devices.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Gamepad safe-entry was rechecked without logout/profile mutation.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Settings Gamepad needs exact focus-target evidence before pass claims.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.trigger_category: focus then activate safe game card
transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: focused dynamic catalog card activated and opened game detail
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Use focus-then-activate and stop before payment or stream boundaries.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Detail content is dynamic; report asserts transition and field categories only.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: TASK-027 must prove source focus and target detail state separately.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.trigger_category: safe server-list focus and scroll sampling
transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: detail server list sampled by safe focus movement without session or payment activation
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Do not start stream, paid session or payment; classify those branches as boundaries.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Server-list fields were treated as dynamic categories; Back did not recover, D-pad Left recovered rail focus.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Assert row field categories, focus and boundary handling, not complete server enumeration.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.trigger_category: classify boundary, local-only decode when needed, then safe recovery
transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: catalog QR boundary observed; local-only decode attempt failed after partial crop issue; forbidden external traversal not followed
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Never follow QR targets; use Back, close, cancel or force-stop relaunch.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: QR targets stayed local-only and were not opened; recurring QR decode references must stay local-only.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Boundaries are terminal graph nodes, not passed product flows.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: Home and foreground returned to the same safe post-auth Settings state
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Foreground only; do not mutate profile or session state.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Foreground persistence was observed without account/profile mutation.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: TASK-027 must attach persistence evidence to graph nodes.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: direct force-stop, Home and explicit relaunch recovered actionable catalog after a failed helper-wrapper attempt
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Use only as recovery evidence, not proof that the trapped transition succeeded.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: Approved cleanup recovery restored actionable catalog when executed through direct adb commands and verified visually.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Recovery success and original transition failure must be represented as separate graph edges.

transition_graph_closure_ledger.observed_transition_category: ambient recurrence and loader occurred, then direct cleanup relaunch recovered actionable catalog
transition_graph_closure_ledger.recovery_policy: Classify ambient/system surface as external and recover app foreground before continuing.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.public_safe_note: External ambient/screensaver recurrence was recovered to app catalog through approved cleanup.
transition_graph_closure_ledger.test_design_implication: Recovery must prove foreground plus actionable focus.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Launch, relaunch or foreground recovery after external ambient state.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Catalog loads without prolonged ambiguous loading.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Catalog recovered once after approved force-stop relaunch, but later ambient recovery returned to prolonged loader through bounded waits.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely startup or foreground recovery race with external TV ambient state
anomaly_records.recovery_action: use approved force-stop and explicit relaunch only; do not count loader as catalog coverage
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Track first-launch, ambient recovery and explicit relaunch as separate graph edges.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Open Search, attempt safe text input and recover with Back or Escape.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Search closes or returns to catalog by safe Back or route action.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Search keyboard remained visible; safe text input had no visible effect and Back or Escape did not recover.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely TV keyboard focus capture or input-method mismatch
anomaly_records.recovery_action: force-stop and explicit relaunch restored catalog once
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Search no-results remains blocked until a visible keyboard input path and safe recovery are proven.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Navigate from Settings root toward Gamepad safe entry.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Gamepad setup opens without profile/logout mutation.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Precise safe Gamepad entry opened the Gamepad setup screen and close returned to Settings root.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: prior selected-lane issue likely depended on focus target ambiguity
anomaly_records.recovery_action: close Gamepad setup; avoid logout/profile confirmation
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Gamepad route is passable only with exact target evidence; generic Settings focus remains risky.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Capture screenshot through an unsafe binary redirection path.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Screenshot file is valid visual evidence.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Initial screenshot artifact was corrupted and could not be used as evidence.
anomaly_records.recovery_action: switch screenshot capture to a binary-safe process stream and recapture checkpoint
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Do visual sanity checks before counting any screenshot checkpoint.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Decode catalog banner QR from TASK-027R evidence.
anomaly_records.expected_result: QR target decoded local-only without following it.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Initial crop was partial; fullscreen local-only decode did not decode in this run.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely insufficient QR crop or screenshot-quality constraint
anomaly_records.recovery_action: do not follow QR; reference prior local-only recurring QR decode artifacts where applicable and revisit at the end if needed
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: QR classification remains boundary-safe, but decode tooling quality is a separate evidence gap.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Press Back from game detail server-list sampling.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Return to prior catalog or detail state.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Back did not recover from the server-list state; D-pad Left recovered rail focus while keeping detail context.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely focus context or nested list navigation behavior
anomaly_records.recovery_action: use D-pad Left for safe recovery; do not activate server/session cards
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Server-list recovery should test Back and lateral rail recovery as separate edges.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Open promo-code screen, then attempt intended rail-boundary taps for other sections.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Promo screen recovers or rail taps open the intended safe branch.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The promo-code screen with TV keyboard remained visible across the intended feedback, top-up and journal attempts.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely keyboard or focus overlay captured navigation/tap attempts
anomaly_records.recovery_action: use approved force-stop and explicit relaunch; do not count intended branches as covered
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Promo-code keyboard recovery and rail switching need explicit checkpoints before branch coverage claims.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Force-stop and relaunch after promo-code trap, then recover from external ambient surface.
anomaly_records.expected_result: App foreground returns to actionable catalog or prior safe state.
anomaly_records.observed_result: Foreground returned to app loader after one recovery path, but a later clean direct force-stop, Home and explicit launch sequence returned to actionable catalog.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely app startup or foreground state recovery race after external ambient interruption
anomaly_records.recovery_action: use direct adb recovery commands with visual checkpoint verification; avoid relying on the failed helper wrapper
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Remaining branches must not be marked covered while loader blocks visual content.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: Run a local PowerShell helper around approved force-stop, Home and explicit launch recovery commands.
anomaly_records.expected_result: Helper records accurate adb command exit status while preserving local-only raw output.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The helper reported non-zero command codes while the visual checkpoint was still captured; subsequent classification uses the screenshot and local-only command artifacts, not the wrapper status alone.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely local PowerShell argument-splatting wrapper issue
anomaly_records.recovery_action: avoid this helper shape and use explicit adb invocations or previously proven capture helpers
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Do not classify product recovery from wrapper exit code alone; require visual checkpoint evidence.

anomaly_records.trigger_action: From actionable catalog with expanded rail, tap session journal, Steam/top-up and feedback rail regions.
anomaly_records.expected_result: The intended rail branch opens or shows its boundary screen with recoverable app state.
anomaly_records.observed_result: The visual checkpoints remained on the catalog after the intended rail-route taps; no journal, Steam/top-up or feedback branch was opened in this attempt.
anomaly_records.likely_or_hypothesis_cause: likely coordinate/focus mismatch on expanded TV rail from the catalog state
anomaly_records.recovery_action: do not count the intended branches as covered; continue in a fresh runtime thread with focus-verified D-pad route or UI-tree-derived target selection
anomaly_records.test_design_implication: Rail-route branch coverage requires visual proof of destination state, not just an input event.

unverified_areas: feedback QR branch in current TASK-027R runtime after promo-code keyboard trap
Steam or top-up QR branch in current TASK-027R runtime after promo-code keyboard trap
session journal empty state in current TASK-027R runtime after promo-code keyboard trap
Search typed no-results completion without keyboard trap
consistent force-stop relaunch recovery after ambient/screensaver recurrence
current dynamic game and server list behavior beyond sampled categories
payment, stream, external browser, account mutation and network manipulation boundaries beyond safe classification
rail-route taps to session journal, Steam/top-up and feedback from the recovered catalog state
